title: Green Apples
description: A simple mod that adds Green Apples and more!
body:
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d33b1fe9732e5ebbf37bc052ad04d7e7e22c0248.png)


You must have Fabric API installed!

# Green Apples! This simple mod brings a few simple additions to Minecraft! The mod's main event: the **Green Apple**. A _green_, more _sour_ version of the vanilla Apple! It can be **obtained by breaking birch leaves**, which has a 1 in 200 chance of giving you a Green Apple. This mod also adds the following items: - Green Apple Slices; - Candied Green Apple; - Green Apple Pie; - Cube Of Caramel. (Check Gallery for all **_crafting recipes_**!)
Spoiler The Green Apple has a 15% chance of giving you the Speed effect when consumed! The Candied Green Apple has a 10% chance of giving you the Saturation effect when consumed!
